title: War criminal Mladic close to death, say lawyers asking judge for jail release
summary_full: Mladic, 84, was jailed for life for genocide, war crimes and crimes against humanity during the Bosnian war in 1992-95.
summary_public: Mladic, 84, was jailed for life for genocide, war crimes and crimes against humanity during the Bosnian war in 1992-95.

BA.label: positive
BA.evidence: Mladic was jailed for life for genocide, war crimes
